articles.description: A pedestrian was taken to hospital with serious injuries after he was struck by an SUV that left the roadway in Centretown. articles.title: Not only is Lake Powell's water level plummeting because of drought, its total capacity is shrinking, too
articles.description: Lake Powell, the second-largest human-made reservoir in the US, has lost nearly 7% of its potential storage capacity since 1963, when Glen Canyon Dam was built, a new report shows.

articles.title: Letters, April 24, 2026: ‘Keep changing the clocks’
articles.description: Change is good If Alberta changes the clocks to standard time, it means that in the winter months (November-March) it would be dark in the mornings until 9 a.m. and stay light in the evenings. Now it gets light in the morning around 6:30 a.m. and in the evenings it gets dark around 9 p.m.
